sources.title: Operation: PutObject (S3)
sources.description: Detect write request waste before it compounds.
sources.body: PutObject can trigger millions of requests and hidden charges.

sources.title: Service: AWS Lambda
sources.body: Lambda burst traffic can create noisy cost spikes.

sources.title: Metric: Unit Cost
sources.body: Unit cost by transaction highlights hidden inefficiency.
